fonts.note: Matches Cool Hollow Solutions' real site font (Google Fonts, weights 300-700). No Coaching-specific font chosen yet, inherited as the starting point.

logo_note: Decided: Coaching keeps the compass/needle device from Cool Hollow Solutions (refs/chs-logo-white-reference.png), recolored to gold (#C8A227) and black (#1A1A1A). Not yet drawn cleanly, the exploratory draft (cool-hollow-coaching-logo-draft.svg) has real rendering bugs (broken arc geometry, wordmark clips off the canvas) and is not an approved file. Still set to null until a properly executed version exists.
devices_note: Decided: Coaching shares the compass/needle device with Cool Hollow Solutions, on purpose, reinforcing the shared lineage. Recolored to the Coaching palette (gold and black), not reused as-is.
style_block: Grounded, financial-advisory photography and illustration style. Black (#1A1A1A) and white, with a single gold accent (#C8A227) used sparingly for emphasis, not decoration. Clean, minimal, high-contrast compositions with soft natural light. Real business settings: a desk, a P&L on a screen, an owner mid-decision, not generic stock-photo gloss. Leave negative space for text overlay. No corporate clip-art, no fake smiling stock photography, no other colors introduced.

campaign.formula: Lead with the outcome, then the proof. [Pain point]. [The number/result]. [Plain next step.]
campaign.endcard: Cool Hollow Coaching · Business Without You
